Table summary. File name: docs/document-inventory.md. Type of document: Inventory / project control. Purpose: Track source and draft documents in the repository.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: All project reviewers. Handbook: No. Open questions: Who owns keeping this inventory current?. File name: docs/project-dashboard.md. Type of document: Superseded dashboard redirect. Purpose: Preserve older links while directing readers to the canonical leader-friendly dashboard.. Current status: Superseded. Related committee/body: Documentation stewards. Handbook: No. Open questions: None; update only if the canonical dashboard path changes.. File name: docs/document-stewardship.md. Type of document: Administrative guide. Purpose: Define document ownership, stewardship, review, approval, lifecycle, and archival responsibilities.. Current status: Needs Leadership Review. Related committee/body: Leadership, committees, documentation stewards, Church Clerk. Handbook: No. Open questions: Who will serve as the first two documentation stewards?. File name: docs/start-here/treasurer-finance-chair-quick-start.md. Type of document: Audience guide. Purpose: Give the Treasurer, Interim Treasurer, or Finance Committee chair a focused path through the most relevant governance, role, procedure, and current-work documents.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Treasurer, Finance Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Is this the right initial reading set, and what should be added or removed?. File name: docs/00-project-brief.md. Type of document: Project brief. Purpose: Explain the Treasurer transition, deeper operations issue, and desired future state.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: Should this remain a project brief or become a short manual introduction?. File name: docs/01-current-state-assessment.md. Type of document: Assessment. Purpose: Organize current problems by role clarity, committee ownership, manual processes, software, spending, budget, and documentation.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: Which observations should be validated by Finance Committee before being used publicly?. File name: docs/02-decision-log.md. Type of document: Decision log. Purpose: Record project decisions, owners, status, and notes.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: All project reviewers. Handbook: No. Open questions: Who is responsible for updating decisions after meetings?. File name: docs/03-open-questions.md. Type of document: Project issue register. Purpose: Track unresolved questions for Personnel, Finance, Nominating, Deacons, Pastor, Congregation, and professional review.. Current status: Working Record. Related committee/body: All project reviewers. Handbook: No. Open questions: Which questions must be answered before any church vote?. File name: docs/implementation-roadmap.md. Type of document: Implementation roadmap. Purpose: Organize stabilization, 30-day, 60-day, 90-day, and long-term Handbook integration work.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Pastor, Deacons, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: No. Open questions: Who owns roadmap updates and phase completion tracking?. File name: docs/document-workflow-upgrade-notes.md. Type of document: Workflow review note. Purpose: Capture useful patterns and upgrade opportunities from the prior KBC Personnel Committee repository.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, document maintainers. Handbook: No. Open questions: Which workflow improvements should be implemented next, especially Windows-friendly local export?. File name: docs/finance-committee-review-workflow.md. Type of document: Administrative guide. Purpose: Define the timestamped Finance Committee export, returned-DOCX intake, source comparison, and controlled Markdown update process.. Current status: Current. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, document owners, documentation stewards. Handbook: No. Open questions: Who will coordinate each review round and confirm committee dispositions?. File name: docs/governance/constitution-and-bylaws-reference.md. Type of document: Governance reference page.
